stemHtml: The effect of a higher take-off flap setting up to the maximum certified take-off flap setting is…

options.a: an increase of the field length limited take-off mass but a decrease of the climb limited take-off mass.
options.b: a decrease of both the field length limited take-off mass and the climb limited take-off mass.
options.c: an increase of both the field length limited take-off mass and the climb limited take-off mass.
options.d: a decrease of the field length limited take-off mass but an increase of the climb limited take-off mass.
